notableEvents.label: Ryan Jeffers reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Jeffers reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Luis Rengifo.

notableEvents.label: Brooks Lee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee grounds into a double play, shortstop David Hamilton to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. James Outman scores. Austin Martin out at 2nd. Brooks Lee out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Brooks Lee. Jackson Chourio scores. Interference error by third baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Josh Bell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Ryan Jeffers out at 2nd. Josh Bell out at 1st.
